g.text: I build resilient financial systems and intelligent hardware — two worlds
most engineers never bridge. From FinTech APIs processing real money to
ESP32 firmware controlling physical environments — I ship solutions
that live both in the cloud and on the chip.
ASP.NET CORE ✦ ESP32 FIRMWARE ✦ MATTER PROTOCOL ✦ AZURE IOT HUB ✦ CLEAN ARCHITECTURE ✦ ROBOTICS ✦ SMART HOME ✦ MICROSERVICES ✦ STEM EDUCATOR ✦ ASP.NET CORE ✦ ESP32 FIRMWARE ✦ MATTER PROTOCOL ✦
Most developers pick a lane — web or hardware. I never did.
C# moves money. C++ moves motors. The intersection is
where the most interesting problems live.
ASP.NET MVC CORE · C# · ADO.NET · SQL SERVER
ESP32 · MATTER · RASPBERRY PI · AZURE IOT
AZURE IOT HUB · REACT · SIGNALR · ESP32
